summary: Applied the ADR 0122 Windmill operator admin hotfix live by staging the worker checkout, correcting the raw app route and roster error handling, and reseeding the operator Windmill scripts with runtime-compatible wrapper commands.

verification.observed: A live rerun of playbooks/windmill.yml limited to docker-runtime-lv3 completed successfully after the worker checkout sync, writable worker mount, and script reseed changes were applied.
POST /api/w/lv3/jobs/run_wait_result/p/f/lv3/operator_roster returned status=ok with one active operator instead of the earlier blocked PyYAML or missing-checkout payload.
The workspace-scoped route /apps/get/p/f/lv3/operator_access_admin returned HTTP 200 after login, and the raw app no longer depends on a crashing roster payload shape.

The inventory wrapper now executes from the worker checkout with uv and PYTHONPATH, but the live call still returns an error because controller-local Keycloak bootstrap secrets are not projected into /srv/proxmox_florin_server/.local on the worker host.

notes: The original user-visible failure was the operator roster crash on page load. That is fixed live.
OpenBao sealed during the hotfix converge replay and was manually unsealed again using the existing bootstrap keys before the successful replay completed.
